labels.name: status:backlog
labels.description: Well-formed scope but not yet refined to dispatch readiness.

labels.name: status:ready
labels.description: Spec'd; ACs converged; awaiting operator authorization.

labels.name: status:in-progress
labels.description: Claimed by a dispatch wake; cycle running.

labels.name: status:review
labels.description: Cell complete; awaiting external/operator review of the receipt/result.

labels.name: status:changes
labels.description: External review requested changes; issue must be revised before re-dispatch.

labels.name: status:blocked
labels.description: Gated on external input (operator, infra, external authority).

labels.name: dispatch:cell
labels.description: Executable cell; claimable by a dispatch wake with status:todo and a matching protocol:{id}.
